name: player nfl teams
description: Test case for player nfl teams
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.year = player_years.year and t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023,2024) where t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams::text[] && ARRAY['CIN']::text[] group by t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 3 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
